summary: Configure an app/dashboard to support sending chain-key tokens (ckBTC, ckETH, ckUSDC) by adding correct mainnet ledger canister IDs.
architectural_notes: Sending ckBTC/ckETH/ckUSDC requires the correct per-token ledger canister ID to call the ledger's ICRC transfer method (e.g., icrc1_transfer).

existing_features.title: Populate the token configuration so ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC have correct Internet Computer mainnet ledger canister IDs, enabling the Send UI for each token.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add/configure correct mainnet ledger canister IDs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC so sending is enabled.

projectName: Configure mainnet ledger canister IDs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC
